---
title: "Ink Logic Test"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
revealjs-plugins:
  - ink
---

## Test results

::: {#results}
Running...
:::

## Slide two

```{=html}
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  setTimeout(function () {
    var out = [];
    function check(name, cond) {
      out.push((cond ? "PASS" : "FAIL") + " - " + name);
    }
    var api = window.InkAnnotate._api;
    var canvas = document.getElementById("ink-canvas");
    localStorage.removeItem(api.storageKey());
    Object.keys(api.getStrokes()).forEach(function (k) {
      delete api.getStrokes()[k];
    });
    api.setDrawMode(true);
    function ev(type, x, y) {
      canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent(type, {
        clientX: x, clientY: y, pointerId: 1, pointerType: "mouse",
        buttons: 1, bubbles: true, pressure: 0.5
      }));
    }
    function stroke(x0, y0, x1, y1) {
      ev("pointerdown", x0, y0);
      for (var i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
        ev("pointermove", x0 + (x1 - x0) * i / 10, y0 + (y1 - y0) * i / 10);
      }
      ev("pointerup", x1, y1);
    }
    function count() {
      return (api.getStrokes()["0.0"] || []).length;
    }

    api.setTool("pen");
    stroke(300, 300, 600, 300);
    stroke(300, 350, 600, 350);
    check("two strokes drawn", count() === 2);

    // slide-space storage: points must differ from raw client coords
    var p = api.getStrokes()["0.0"][0].points[0];
    var scale = Reveal.getScale();
    var rect = document.querySelector(".slides").getBoundingClientRect();
    var expected = (300 - rect.left) / scale;
    check("points stored in slide coordinates",
      Math.abs(p[0] - expected) < 1);

    api.undo();
    check("undo removes one", count() === 1);
    api.redo();
    check("redo restores it", count() === 2);

    api.setTool("eraser");
    stroke(450, 340, 460, 360);
    check("eraser removes hit stroke", count() === 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores erased stroke", count() === 2);
    api.redo();
    check("redo re-erases it", count() === 1);

    api.setShape("rect");
    stroke(200, 200, 400, 280);
    check("shape stroke added", count() === 2);
    var last = api.getStrokes()["0.0"][1];
    check("shape recorded as rect",
      last.tool === "shape" && last.shape === "rect");
    var autoBar = document.querySelector(".ink-sel-controls");
    check("new shape is auto-selected",
      !!autoBar && autoBar.style.display !== "none");
    // tapping the interior of a rect selects it too
    api.setTool("pen"); // deselect via tool change
    api.setTool("shape");
    check("tool change deselects", autoBar.style.display === "none");
    ev("pointerdown", 300, 240); // inside the rect, not on its edge
    ev("pointerup", 300, 240);
    check("tap inside rect selects it",
      autoBar.style.display !== "none");
    api.setTool("pen");
    api.setTool("shape");

    api.setTool("eraser");
    stroke(200, 200, 210, 210); // corner of rect
    check("eraser removes shape by perimeter", count() === 1);

    // smart snapping: near-horizontal line snaps to exactly horizontal
    api.setShape("line");
    stroke(300, 500, 600, 508);
    var snapped = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("near-horizontal line snaps flat",
      Math.abs(snapped.points[0][1] - snapped.points[1][1]) < 0.01);

    // near-square rect snaps to a square
    api.setShape("rect");
    stroke(700, 300, 800, 396);
    var sq = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("near-square rect snaps square",
      Math.abs(Math.abs(sq.points[1][0] - sq.points[0][0]) -
               Math.abs(sq.points[1][1] - sq.points[0][1])) < 0.01);

    // ---- text tool ----
    api.setTool("text");
    ev("pointerdown", 640, 520);
    ev("pointerup", 640, 520);
    var ta = document.querySelector(".ink-text-editor");
    check("text tap opens editor", !!ta);
    var beforeText = count();
    ta.value = "Hello ink";
    api.commitTextEditor();
    var note = api.getStrokes()["0.0"].slice(-1)[0];
    check("text note committed",
      count() === beforeText + 1 &&
      note.tool === "text" && note.text === "Hello ink");
    api.undo();
    check("undo removes text note", count() === beforeText);
    api.redo();
    check("redo restores text note", count() === beforeText + 1);

    // tap on the note re-opens its editor prefilled
    var nsx = rect.left + (note.points[0][0] + 5) * scale;
    var nsy = rect.top + (note.points[0][1] + 5) * scale;
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    var ta2 = document.querySelector(".ink-text-editor");
    check("tap on note reopens editor",
      !!ta2 && ta2.value === "Hello ink");
    ta2.value = "Edited";
    api.commitTextEditor();
    check("text edit committed", note.text === "Edited");
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores original text", note.text === "Hello ink");
    api.redo();

    // dragging a note moves it, and the move is undoable
    var origX = note.points[0][0];
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointermove", nsx + 60, nsy + 30);
    ev("pointerup", nsx + 60, nsy + 30);
    check("drag moves text note",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX - 60 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores note position",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX) < 0.01);

    // corner controls: plus grows the font, handle moves the box
    api.setTool("text");
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    var bar = document.querySelector(".ink-ed-controls");
    check("editor shows corner controls",
      !!bar && bar.children.length === 4);
    var sizeBefore = note.size;
    bar.children[2].dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 21 }));
    api.commitTextEditor();
    check("plus button grows font size", note.size > sizeBefore);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores font size", note.size === sizeBefore);

    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    var handle = document.querySelector(".ink-ed-controls .ink-text-move");
    var hr = handle.getBoundingClientRect();
    var hx = hr.left + 5, hy = hr.top + 5;
    handle.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 22, clientX: hx, clientY: hy }));
    handle.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointermove",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 22,
        clientX: hx + 50, clientY: hy + 25 }));
    handle.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup",
      { bubbles: true, pointerId: 22,
        clientX: hx + 50, clientY: hy + 25 }));
    api.commitTextEditor();
    check("handle drag moves note",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX - 50 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores handle move",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX) < 0.01);

    // trash button deletes the note (undoably)
    var delBefore = count();
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    document.querySelector(".ink-ed-controls .ink-text-trash")
      .dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown",
        { bubbles: true, pointerId: 23 }));
    check("trash button deletes note", count() === delBefore - 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores trashed note", count() === delBefore);

    // text notes are also grabbable with the pen tool
    api.setTool("pen");
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointermove", nsx + 40, nsy + 20);
    ev("pointerup", nsx + 40, nsy + 20);
    check("pen drag moves text note",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX - 40 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores pen-drag position",
      Math.abs(note.points[0][0] - origX) < 0.01);
    var penTap = count();
    ev("pointerdown", nsx, nsy);
    ev("pointerup", nsx, nsy);
    check("pen tap on note draws nothing", count() === penTap);

    // shape selection: tap shows controls, drag moves, trash deletes
    api.setTool("shape");
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300);
    var sbar = document.querySelector(".ink-sel-controls");
    check("shape tap shows controls",
      !!sbar && sbar.style.display !== "none");
    var sqBefore = sq.points[0].slice();
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointermove", 730, 320);
    ev("pointerup", 730, 320);
    check("shape drag moves it",
      Math.abs(sq.points[0][0] - sqBefore[0] - 30 / scale) < 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores shape position",
      Math.abs(sq.points[0][0] - sqBefore[0]) < 0.01);
    var scount = count();
    ev("pointerdown", 700, 300);
    ev("pointerup", 700, 300);
    sbar.querySelector(".ink-text-trash").dispatchEvent(
      new PointerEvent("pointerdown", { bubbles: true, pointerId: 24 }));
    check("shape trash deletes it", count() === scount - 1);
    check("controls hide after delete", sbar.style.display === "none");
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores trashed shape", count() === scount);

    // eraser removes text notes by bounding box
    var beforeErase = count();
    api.setTool("eraser");
    stroke(nsx, nsy, nsx + 8, nsy + 8);
    check("eraser removes text note", count() === beforeErase - 1);
    api.undo();
    check("undo restores erased note", count() === beforeErase);

    // leave a plain pen stroke on top of the history for the
    // gesture test below
    api.setTool("pen");
    stroke(300, 600, 400, 600);

    // two-finger tap undoes the last action
    var before = count();
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown", {
      clientX: 400, clientY: 300, pointerId: 11, pointerType: "touch",
      buttons: 1, bubbles: true }));
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerdown", {
      clientX: 430, clientY: 300, pointerId: 12, pointerType: "touch",
      buttons: 1, bubbles: true }));
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup", {
      clientX: 400, clientY: 300, pointerId: 11, pointerType: "touch",
      bubbles: true }));
    canvas.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent("pointerup", {
      clientX: 430, clientY: 300, pointerId: 12, pointerType: "touch",
      bubbles: true }));
    check("two-finger tap undoes", count() === before - 1);
    api.redo();
    check("redo after gesture undo", count() === before);

    // burger menu integration: ink appears under Tools and toggles
    var inkTool = document.querySelector("[data-ink-tool] a");
    check("burger menu has ink tool", !!inkTool);
    if (inkTool) {
      api.setDrawMode(false);
      inkTool.click();
      check("menu tool toggles draw mode",
        document.body.classList.contains("ink-drawing"));
    }

    // more menu: every item carries an icon
    check("menu items have icons",
      document.querySelectorAll(
        "#ink-menu .ink-menu-item .ink-menu-ico svg").length === 5);

    // annotated html export embeds the strokes as a seed
    var captured = null;
    var origCreate = URL.createObjectURL;
    var origClick = HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click;
    URL.createObjectURL = function (b) { captured = b; return "blob:t"; };
    HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = function () {};
    api.exportHtml(); // async: inlines assets before download
    setTimeout(function () {
      URL.createObjectURL = origCreate;
      HTMLAnchorElement.prototype.click = origClick;
      check("export html produces a file", !!captured);
      if (captured) {
        captured.text().then(function (t) {
          // build the needle dynamically so this test's own inline
          // source (also present in the export) cannot match it
          var orbId = 'id="' + "ink-orb" + '-root"';
          check("exported html embeds ink seed",
            t.indexOf("InkAnnotateSeed = {") >= 0 &&
            t.indexOf('"tool":"text"') >= 0 &&
            t.indexOf(orbId) < 0);
        });
      }
    }, 500);

    var saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(api.storageKey()));
    check("strokes persisted to localStorage",
      saved && saved["0.0"].length === count());

    var slide1Count = count();
    Reveal.right();
    setTimeout(function () {
      api.setTool("pen");
      stroke(300, 400, 500, 400);
      check("slide 2 has own strokes",
        (api.getStrokes()["1.0"] || []).length === 1);
      check("slide 1 strokes untouched",
        (api.getStrokes()["0.0"] || []).length === slide1Count);
      api.undo();
      check("undo is per slide",
        (api.getStrokes()["1.0"] || []).length === 0 &&
        (api.getStrokes()["0.0"] || []).length === slide1Count);
      Reveal.left();
      setTimeout(function () {
        document.getElementById("results").innerHTML =
          "<pre style='font-size:0.55em'>" + out.join("\n") + "</pre>";
        document.title = "ink-tests-" +
          (out.every(function (l) { return l.indexOf("PASS") === 0; })
            ? "allpass" : "failed");
      }, 300);
    }, 600);
  }, 1500);
});
</script>
```
